final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing infographic poster in the style of a Chinese national museum exhibition panel, presenting a detailed visual guide to a traditional Miao ethnic minority costume.

Style/medium: museum exhibition infographic, archival illustration style with technical diagram precision, matte paper texture, restrained academic aesthetic inspired by National Museum of China display panels
Composition: vertical poster layout with structured grid, central full-figure standing subject wearing complete costume, surrounding annotation zones with leader lines pointing to specific components
Subject: Miao (Hmong) ethnic minority woman's ceremonial festival attire, featuring elaborate silver headdress, embroidered collar jacket, pleated indigo skirt, silver jewelry ornaments, and layered textile construction
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white archival paper background (ivory/rice paper tone), subtle aged texture, clean museum display aesthetic with generous white space
Lighting/mood: even diffused museum lighting, neutral and scholarly atmosphere, no dramatic shadows or highlights
Color palette: muted archival tones with indigo blue as anchor, silver metallic accents, earthy browns and blacks from natural dyes, restrained and scholarly
Materials/textures: hand-woven hemp and cotton base fabrics, wax-resist dyed indigo cloth, intricate silk embroidery with geometric patterns, hand-hammered silver ornaments with repoussé work, detailed close-up swatches showing weave structure
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰 · 苗族盛装图鉴" (main title), "银饰 · 蜡染 · 刺绣" (subtitle), component labels: "银角头饰", "刺绣上衣", "蜡染百褶裙", "银项圈", "绑腿", "绣花鞋"
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only, no English or pinyin, text must be legible and properly arranged, layout must follow specified zones (top title, left structural breakdown, upper-right material samples, middle-right pattern/color meanings, bottom wearing sequence), museum-grade informational clarity
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography style, e-commerce product page look, anime or cosplay style, cluttered or chaotic labeling, incorrect structural annotations, blurry or garbled text, fake material textures, excessive decorative elements, gradient-heavy backgrounds, Behance trendy flat design
